items.title: Guidelines for AI-Assisted Contributions in the ROS Project
items.summary:
Hello fellow ROS users, maintainers, contributors and anyone else who may be passing by.

Due to a recent uptick in LLM-authored pull requests, the ROS PMC has elected to extend the upstream OSRF policy on the use of generative tools to help provide some boundaries/guidelines on the use of these tools. These tools and technologies are con

items.title: Ros2-dev-suite, a StudioCode extension
items.summary:
As shared in a lightning talk at ROSConFr: I have finally completed and “clauded” a comprehensive VS Code extension for ROS 2 development: a unified explorer, live parameter tuner, service/topic/action caller, log viewer, and syntax highlighting for interface files.

My favorite features of the extension, among others:

  • Dynamic

items.title: Nav2 BT Editor: a VS Code extension for editing and previewing Nav2 behavior trees
items.summary:
Dear ROS community,

As I have been using ROS 2 behavior trees more and more, especially with Nav2, I found myself in a slightly awkward workflow.

For small changes or quick previews, opening Groot often felt heavier than what I needed. But once the behavior trees started growing, editing them directly in XML also became harder to r

items.title: A Standard Interface from LLM to Robot Actions
items.summary:
Hi ROS community,

I’m working on ClawsJoy Robotics, a proposal for a standard interface between LLM-based cognitive systems and ROS/2 robots. The core idea: any LLM outputs an action, any robot implements these standard topics.

items.title: Cad to urdf conversion
items.summary:
If you’re a robotics engineer, you’ve probably lost hours to URDF generation.
Not because the robot is complex but because the tooling is.

Renaming mates. Fixing joint axes. Recreating reference frames. Starting over because the CAD came from the “wrong” software.

I got tired of that workflow, so I built Jointly.
Upload

items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

items.title: Advantages of hypoid gearing over worm, bevel and bevel-planetary
items.summary:
Right-angle gearing often requires engineers to compromise between torque capacity and mechanical efficiency. Hypoid gearing offers a balance of mechanical efficiency, load-carrying capability, and single-stage ratio range.

items.title: Claude Meets Blackwell Ultra: Anthropic’s Models Now Run on NVIDIA GB300 in Azure
items.summary: Anthropic’s Claude models in Microsoft Foundry — hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs — are now generally available, giving Azure-native enterprises a powerful new way to build autonomous and domain-specific AI agents.
